---
title: "Research"
---

## Published Papers

::: {.publication}
[**Paper Title One**](files/papers/paper1.pdf)  
*with Coauthor A and Coauthor B*  
[*The Accounting Review*]{.publication-meta}, Vol. XX, Issue Y, Pages ZZZ-ZZZ, YEAR.  
[[Journal](https://doi.org/...)] [[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=...)] [[Code](https://github.com/...)]

<details>
<summary>Abstract</summary>
Abstract text goes here. Keep it to one paragraph.
</details>
:::

::: {.publication}
[**Paper Title Two**](files/papers/paper2.pdf)  
*with Coauthor C*  
[*Journal of Financial Economics*]{.publication-meta}, Vol. XX, YEAR.  
[[Journal](https://doi.org/...)] [[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=...)]

<details>
<summary>Abstract</summary>
Abstract text.
</details>
:::

## Working Papers

::: {.publication}
[**Working Paper Title**](files/papers/wp1.pdf)  
*with Coauthor D*  
[*Revise and resubmit at [Journal Name]*]{.publication-meta}  
[[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=...)]

<details>
<summary>Abstract</summary>
Abstract text.
</details>
:::

## Work in Progress

- "Project title 1" with Coauthor E
- "Project title 2" with Coauthor F
